title: Code Repair (Automated PR)
desc: Given a failing test and code, propose a minimal PR that fixes the test.
prompt: You are an assistant that suggests minimal code changes to fix failing tests. Provide a patch and explanation.

title: Refactor to Async
desc: Convert a synchronous function into an async/await version with the same behavior.
prompt: Refactor the following code to async/await and keep behavior identical.
